description: We make your supply chain effortless.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description1: Feel free to contacts me whether you are looking for a new promising developer for your team, want to stay in contact for future recruitments or just want to leave me a message.
contact.description2: Do not hestitate, my inbox is always open. You can send me an email using button below

about.title: Who am I
about.description1: Based in Poland software developer, with
about.description2_part1: Experienced in building scalable web applications using modern technologies and best practices. Proficient in
about.description2_part3: with a proven track record of delivering high-quality solutions across diverse projects. Demonstrated expertise in full-stack development, collaborative team environments, and competitive programming challenges.

gorrion.description: As a Fullstack Developer, I am developing a SaaS application for the renewable energy sector. I am actively involved in the entire software lifecycle—from system design and maintenance to implementing new features across both the frontend and backend—ensuring high code quality, performance, and scalability. My responsibilities include integrating with a central European database and applying Domain-Driven Design (DDD) to model complex business logic. I maintain rigorous standards by writing unit, integration, and E2E tests, alongside conducting regular code reviews. Working in an Agile environment and actively participating in backlog refinements, I have a direct impact on the technical execution of the product's vision.

euvic.description: I contributed to various web projects, focusing on developing intuitive user interfaces and implementing robust application logic. My role involved integrating external libraries, building new features, and deploying scalable solutions. I collaborated closely with the development team to deliver high-quality products while continuously optimizing code for maximum performance.

webo.description: I developed a modern Single Page Application (SPA) based on comprehensive visual designs, implementing features with high precision and an uncompromising attention to detail. I built dynamic UI components from scratch and collaborated closely with the team to refine and perfect the final user experience.

logi.title: Logi
logi.subtitle: Logistics management system
logi.description: A comprehensive web application designed to support the full operational flow of procurement and sales. It streamlines routine processes by enabling users to add suppliers, create contracts, track inventory changes, link customers, and log transactions, providing a clear and actionable overview of company operations.

timeworth.title: Timeworth
timeworth.subtitle: Team time tracking and management platform
timeworth.description: A robust time-tracking web application designed to help teams efficiently log work hours, manage entries, and generate detailed reports. The platform features secure authentication with seamless token refresh and offers distinct, role-based workflows for managers and employees. By intelligently linking organizations, users, and time logs, the system streamlines approval processes and operational reporting. It also includes bulk data import/export capabilities and a fully responsive interface built with complex, reusable UI components.
